method_cn: v6.3 branch-aware 淘汰赛pipeline：赛前证据与专家委员会生成跨阶段机制，MAS rollout同时给出90分钟、若平进入加时、若仍平进入点球的条件路径，Monte Carlo在完整路径树上采样。
architecture_cn: 加时和点球不再是独立后处理输出；它们由同一条MAS条件rollout驱动，前端三Tab只是同一完整路径分布的不同切片，JSON结构保持v6.2.2兼容。

match.venue: Estadio Azteca / Estadio Banorte, Mexico City

display_path_top3.label: 90分钟1-0，Mexico常规时间晋级。
display_path_top3.label_en: 90 minutes 1-0: Mexico advances in normal time.
display_path_top3.summary_en: 90 minutes 1-0: Mexico advances in normal time.

display_path_top3.label: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，Mexico加时晋级。
display_path_top3.summary_cn: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，Mexico加时晋级。
display_path_top3.label_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; Mexico advances in extra time.
display_path_top3.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; Mexico advances in extra time.

display_path_top3.label: 90分钟0-0、加时0-0后仍平，Ecuador点球晋级。
display_path_top3.label_en: After 0-0 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, Ecuador advances on penalties.
display_path_top3.summary_en: After 0-0 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, Ecuador advances on penalties.

path_top3.label: 90分钟1-0，Mexico常规时间晋级。

path_top3.summary_en: 90 minutes 1-0: Mexico advances in normal time.

path_top3.label: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，Mexico加时晋级。

path_top3.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; Mexico advances in extra time.

representative_paths.summary_en: After 0-0 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, Ecuador advances on penalties.
After 1-1 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, Ecuador advances on penalties.
After 1-1 in 90 minutes and 0-0 in extra time, Ecuador advances on penalties.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟和加时均未分胜负，比赛被压缩为点球随机性与门将/心理优势。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After neither 90 minutes nor extra time produces a winner, the match is compressed into penalty randomness plus goalkeeper and psychological edges.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量1-0，Mexico加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 1-0; Mexico advances in extra time.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟1-1后进入加时，加时增量0-1，Ecuador加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 1-1 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 0-1; Ecuador advances in extra time.

representative_paths.summary_cn: 90分钟0-0后进入加时，加时增量0-1，Ecuador加时晋级。
representative_paths.summary_en: After a 0-0 draw in 90 minutes, extra time adds 0-1; Ecuador advances in extra time.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 90分钟打平后，体能、替补深度和风险偏好在加时阶段放大，形成分胜负路径。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: After a 90-minute draw, fitness, bench depth and risk appetite become amplified in extra time and create winner-deciding paths.

representative_paths.summary_en: 90 minutes 0-1: Ecuador advances in normal time.
90 minutes 1-2: Ecuador advances in normal time.
90 minutes 0-2: Ecuador advances in normal time.

full_path_tail.rationale_cn: 非热门方可能通过常规时间偷袭、加时反击或点球随机性晋级。
full_path_tail.rationale_en: The underdog may advance through a normal-time steal, an extra-time counterattack or penalty randomness.

90 minutes 0-1: Ecuador advances in normal time.
90 minutes 2-0: Mexico advances in normal time.
90 minutes 2-1: Mexico advances in normal time.
90 minutes 1-2: Ecuador advances in normal time.

normal_time.title: 常规时间（90分钟）
normal_time.condition_cn: 完整比赛的90分钟主预测，不含加时和点球。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛进入开放往返，双方进攻均有兑现。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match becomes an open back-and-forth game, with both attacks converting.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 70分钟仍平后的风险偏好分叉：墨西哥更冒险，厄瓜多尔更能、抢断后的快速转换；Mexico打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If it is still level after 70 minutes, risk appetite diverges: Mexico becomes more adventurous, while Ecuador is better positioned for quick transitions after ball wins; Mexico then breaks the defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to grow.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: Ecuador充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Ecuador fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to grow.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入更开放节奏，转换、定位球或领先后空间放大，总进球显著高于主预测低比分重心。
tail_focus.rationale_en: The match shifts into a more open rhythm; transitions, set pieces or space created after a lead push total goals well above the low-scoring main forecast.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 70分钟仍平后的风险偏好分叉：墨西哥更冒险，厄瓜多尔更能；Mexico打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If it is still level after 70 minutes, risk appetite diverges: Mexico becomes more adventurous and Ecuador becomes more transition-oriented; Mexico breaks the defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 抢断后的快速转换、定位球、纪律与点球锚点在加时和末端路径被放大；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Fast transitions after ball wins, set pieces, discipline and the penalty anchor become amplified in extra-time and late-game paths; the match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm with growing space behind the defense.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 紧凑防守对进攻空间的压缩；Ecuador充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Compact defending compresses attacking space; Ecuador fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 70分钟仍平后的风险偏好分叉：墨西哥更冒险，厄瓜多尔更能、抢断后的快速转换；Mexico打破对方防守后扩大领先优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If it is still level after 70 minutes, risk appetite diverges: Mexico becomes more adventurous, while Ecuador is better positioned for quick transitions after ball wins; Mexico then breaks the defense and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 70分钟仍平后的风险偏好分叉：墨西哥更冒险，厄瓜多尔更能；比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: If it is still level after 70 minutes, risk appetite diverges: Mexico becomes more adventurous and Ecuador becomes more transition-oriented, pulling the match into a high-risk open rhythm with growing space behind the defense.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 早段进球、红黄牌压力、体能或防线失衡导致比赛失去均衡，一方在90分钟内明显拉开。
tail_focus.definition_en: Either side wins by at least three goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: An early goal, card pressure, fatigue or defensive imbalance breaks the match open and one side pulls clearly ahead within 90 minutes.

tail_focus.label_cn: 爆冷 / 非热门方取胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 赛前或主预测中相对不被看好的一方在90分钟获胜。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: Ecuador通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Ecuador gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition play.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: Ecuador通过压迫或转换取得一球优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Ecuador gains a one-goal edge through pressing or transition play.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: Ecuador充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Ecuador fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: Ecuador充分兑现反击或进攻效率并扩大优势。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Ecuador fully converts its counterattacking or attacking efficiency and extends the lead.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 比赛被拉入高风险开放节奏，防线身后空间持续放大。
selected_scores.rationale_en: The match is pulled into a high-risk open rhythm, with space behind the defensive line continuing to grow.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 非热门方通过低位韧性、反击效率、定位球或热门方关键失误，在90分钟直接改变胜负方向。
tail_focus.definition_en: The side that is less favored pre-match or in the main forecast wins within 90 minutes.
tail_focus.rationale_en: The underdog changes the result directly within 90 minutes through low-block resilience, counterattacking efficiency, set pieces or a key error by the favored side.

key_factors.impact_cn: 墨西哥小组赛全胜且零失球，并在墨西哥城作战，因此normal_time 0-30：墨西哥更可能用高压和快速组合抢开局，厄瓜多尔优先保持紧凑低位，限制中路渗透。
key_factors.impact_en: Mexico won every group match without conceding and will play in Mexico City, so in minutes 0-30 Mexico is more likely to press high and combine quickly, while Ecuador keeps a compact low block and limits central penetration.
key_factors.text_cn: 墨西哥小组赛全胜且零失球，并在墨西哥城作战，因此normal_time 0-30：墨西哥更可能用高压和快速组合抢开局，厄瓜多尔优先保持紧凑低位，限制中路渗透。
key_factors.text_en: Mexico won every group match without conceding and will play in Mexico City, so in minutes 0-30 Mexico is more likely to press high and combine quickly, while Ecuador keeps a compact low block and limits central penetration.

key_factors.impact_cn: 墨西哥以主场和小组第一身份进入淘汰赛，外部期待较高，因此normal_time 0-30：淘汰赛开局双方都不必立即失衡，墨西哥主导节奏，厄瓜多尔优先不让比赛开放。
key_factors.impact_en: Mexico enters the knockout stage at home and as group winner, with high external expectations. In minutes 0-30, neither side needs to lose balance immediately: Mexico should control tempo, while Ecuador prioritizes keeping the match closed.
key_factors.text_cn: 墨西哥以主场和小组第一身份进入淘汰赛，外部期待较高，因此normal_time 0-30：淘汰赛开局双方都不必立即失衡，墨西哥主导节奏，厄瓜多尔优先不让比赛开放。
key_factors.text_en: Mexico enters the knockout stage at home and as group winner, with high external expectations. In minutes 0-30, neither side needs to lose balance immediately: Mexico should control tempo, while Ecuador prioritizes keeping the match closed.

key_factors.impact_cn: 定位球在赛事进球中占有可观比例，低比分淘汰赛中权重会被放大，因此normal_time 0-30：若厄瓜多尔低位限制运动战，墨西哥会更多依赖角球、边路任意球和二点球制造破局点。
key_factors.impact_en: Set pieces account for a meaningful share of tournament goals and gain weight in low-scoring knockout matches. In minutes 0-30, if Ecuador’s low block limits open play, Mexico will rely more on corners, wide free kicks and second balls to create the breakthrough.
key_factors.text_cn: 定位球在赛事进球中占有可观比例，低比分淘汰赛中权重会被放大，因此normal_time 0-30：若厄瓜多尔低位限制运动战，墨西哥会更多依赖角球、边路任意球和二点球制造破局点。
key_factors.text_en: Set pieces account for a meaningful share of tournament goals and gain weight in low-scoring knockout matches. In minutes 0-30, if Ecuador’s low block limits open play, Mexico will rely more on corners, wide free kicks and second balls to create the breakthrough.

key_factors.impact_cn: 厄瓜多尔进攻端有高而宽的描述，因此normal_time 0-30：若墨西哥高压有效，厄瓜多尔转换机会可能较少，只能通过宽点留人威慑。
key_factors.impact_en: Ecuador’s attack is described as high and wide, so in minutes 0-30, if Mexico’s press works, Ecuador may have fewer transition chances and may mainly threaten by leaving width high.
key_factors.text_cn: 厄瓜多尔进攻端有高而宽的描述，因此normal_time 0-30：若墨西哥高压有效，厄瓜多尔转换机会可能较少，只能通过宽点留人威慑。
key_factors.text_en: Ecuador’s attack is described as high and wide, so in minutes 0-30, if Mexico’s press works, Ecuador may have fewer transition chances and may mainly threaten by leaving width high.

key_factors.impact_cn: 关键证据：厄瓜多尔的防线核心皮耶罗·因卡皮埃（阿森纳）和威廉·帕乔（巴黎圣日耳曼）将于6月1日加入厄瓜多尔的2026世界杯备战，凸显厄瓜多尔以效力欧洲顶级俱乐部的后卫为支柱、防守见长的特点。
key_factors.impact_en: Key evidence: Ecuador defensive anchors Piero Hincapié (Arsenal) and Willian Pacho (Paris Saint-Germain) are set to join Ecuador’s 2026 World Cup preparations on June 1, highlighting a defense built around defenders from top European clubs.
key_factors.text_cn: 关键证据：厄瓜多尔的防线核心皮耶罗·因卡皮埃（阿森纳）和威廉·帕乔（巴黎圣日耳曼）将于6月1日加入厄瓜多尔的2026世界杯备战，凸显厄瓜多尔以效力欧洲顶级俱乐部的后卫为支柱、防守见长的特点。
key_factors.text_en: Key evidence: Ecuador defensive anchors Piero Hincapié (Arsenal) and Willian Pacho (Paris Saint-Germain) are set to join Ecuador’s 2026 World Cup preparations on June 1, highlighting a defense built around defenders from top European clubs.

key_factors.impact_cn: 关键球员：Mexico’s reported starting lineup vs Czechia included goalkeeper Raul Rangel and defenders J…
key_factors.impact_en: Key players: Mexico’s reported starting lineup against Czechia included goalkeeper Raúl Rangel and defenders J...
key_factors.text_cn: 关键球员：Mexico’s reported starting lineup vs Czechia included goalkeeper Raul Rangel and defenders J…
key_factors.text_en: Key players: Mexico’s reported starting lineup against Czechia included goalkeeper Raúl Rangel and defenders J...

normal_time.condition_en: The main 90-minute prediction for the match, excluding extra time and penalties.

extra_time.title: 加时赛（如进入）
extra_time.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟常规时间打平；输入包括完整90分钟预测、平局比分分布、淘汰赛证据、常规时间Tail与MAS结论。

tail_focus.label: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时偷袭 / 一球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时30分钟内通过反击、定位球或替补冲击形成1球胜负。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: A队凭借体能、替补或压迫优势在加时净胜一球。
tail_focus.definition_en: A one-goal extra-time result created by counters, set pieces or substitute impact within the 30-minute period.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Team A wins extra time by one goal through fitness, bench impact or pressing advantages.

tail_focus.label: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.label_cn: 加时开放 / 双方进球
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时阶段双方均有进球，比赛从谨慎拖入开放对攻。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: 加时阶段比赛打开，双方各有一次有效转化。
tail_focus.label_en: Open extra time / both teams score
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides score in extra time as the match shifts from caution into open exchanges.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Extra time opens up and both sides convert one effective chance.

tail_focus.label: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.label_cn: 体能崩盘 / 加时打穿
tail_focus.definition_cn: 加时净胜至少2球，或总进球达到3球以上的一方打穿路径。
tail_focus.rationale_cn: A队在对手体能或心理崩盘后拉开比分。
tail_focus.definition_en: An extra-time blow-through path where one side wins by at least two goals, or the extra-time total reaches three or more goals.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Team A pulls away after the opponent suffers a fitness or psychological collapse.

key_factors.impact_cn: 加时不是独立比赛，而是90分钟平局分支
key_factors.impact_en: Extra time is not an independent match; it is the branch after a 90-minute draw.
key_factors.text_cn: 加时不是独立比赛，而是90分钟平局分支
key_factors.text_en: Extra time is not an independent match; it is the branch after a 90-minute draw.

key_factors.impact_cn: 采用常规时间预测、淘汰赛证据块、体能/替补/风险偏好/点球能力/压力因素的后备整合
key_factors.impact_en: Uses a fallback integration of the normal-time forecast, knockout evidence blocks, fitness, bench depth, risk appetite, penalty ability and pressure factors.
key_factors.text_cn: 采用常规时间预测、淘汰赛证据块、体能/替补/风险偏好/点球能力/压力因素的后备整合
key_factors.text_en: Uses a fallback integration of the normal-time forecast, knockout evidence blocks, fitness, bench depth, risk appetite, penalty ability and pressure factors.

key_factors.impact_cn: 未获得足够结构化LLM讨论时，使用保守条件先验
key_factors.impact_en: Uses conservative conditional priors when there is not enough structured LLM discussion.
key_factors.text_cn: 未获得足够结构化LLM讨论时，使用保守条件先验
key_factors.text_en: Uses conservative conditional priors when there is not enough structured LLM discussion.

key_factors.impact_cn: 核心争议在于强队是否提前冒险避免点球，以及弱队能否靠体能和防守纪律拖入点球
key_factors.impact_en: The key question is whether the stronger side risks more to avoid penalties, and whether the weaker side can use fitness and defensive discipline to drag the match to a shootout.
key_factors.text_cn: 核心争议在于强队是否提前冒险避免点球，以及弱队能否靠体能和防守纪律拖入点球
key_factors.text_en: The key question is whether the stronger side risks more to avoid penalties, and whether the weaker side can use fitness and defensive discipline to drag the match to a shootout.

key_factors.impact_cn: 加时rollout以0-0保守路径为基础，同时保留强队加时解决和弱队反击偷袭两类分支
key_factors.impact_en: The extra-time rollout is anchored by a conservative 0-0 path while retaining two branches: the stronger side settling it in extra time and the weaker side stealing it on the counter.
key_factors.text_cn: 加时rollout以0-0保守路径为基础，同时保留强队加时解决和弱队反击偷袭两类分支
key_factors.text_en: The extra-time rollout is anchored by a conservative 0-0 path while retaining two branches: the stronger side settling it in extra time and the weaker side stealing it on the counter.

extra_time.workflow_cn: 加时专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 条件Rollout → 条件蒙特卡洛矩阵 → 加时Tail审计 → 报告输出。
extra_time.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes; inputs include the full 90-minute prediction, draw score distribution, knockout evidence, normal-time tail scenarios and MAS conclusions.
extra_time.workflow_en: Extra-time-specific flow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → conditional rollouts → conditional Monte Carlo matrix → extra-time tail audit → report output.

penalties.title: 点球大战（如进入）
penalties.condition_cn: 条件：90分钟打平且加时仍平。输入包括90分钟预测、加时Mini-Pipeline结果、点球证据、门将/主罚手/压力因素。

tail_focus.label: 门将连续扑点
tail_focus.definition_cn: 一方门将连续扑点或对手连续罚丢，点球比分被迅速拉开。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves swing the shootout outcome.

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves swing the shootout outcome.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 门将连续扑点改变胜负。
tail_focus.definition_en: One goalkeeper makes consecutive saves, or the opponent misses repeatedly, causing the shootout score to widen quickly.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Consecutive goalkeeper saves swing the shootout outcome.

tail_focus.label: 热门方压力失误
tail_focus.definition_cn: 更被看好的一方在关键轮次罚丢，非热门方点球晋级。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
selected_scores.rationale_en: A core taker for the favored team misses under pressure.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 热门球队压力下核心罚手失误。
tail_focus.definition_en: The favored side misses in a key round, allowing the underdog to advance on penalties.
tail_focus.rationale_en: A core taker for the favored team misses under pressure.

tail_focus.label: 延长点球决胜
tail_focus.definition_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入6+轮突然死亡后才分胜负。

selected_scores.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
selected_scores.rationale_en: Both teams are strong through the first five kicks, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

tail_focus.rationale_cn: 双方前五轮质量较高，进入延长点球。
tail_focus.definition_en: Both sides are strong through the first five rounds, and the winner is decided only after sudden death from round six onward.
tail_focus.rationale_en: Both teams are strong through the first five kicks, pushing the shootout into sudden death.

key_factors.impact_cn: 采用点球能力、门将状态、淘汰赛经验与压力因素的保守后备整合
key_factors.impact_en: Uses a conservative fallback integration of penalty ability, goalkeeper form, knockout experience and pressure factors.
key_factors.text_cn: 采用点球能力、门将状态、淘汰赛经验与压力因素的保守后备整合
key_factors.text_en: Uses a conservative fallback integration of penalty ability, goalkeeper form, knockout experience and pressure factors.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球大战随机性强，应以门将、主罚手深度、淘汰赛经验和心理压力作小幅条件调整
key_factors.impact_en: Penalty shootouts are highly random, so only small conditional adjustments should be made for goalkeepers, taker depth, knockout experience and pressure.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球大战随机性强，应以门将、主罚手深度、淘汰赛经验和心理压力作小幅条件调整
key_factors.text_en: Penalty shootouts are highly random, so only small conditional adjustments should be made for goalkeepers, taker depth, knockout experience and pressure.

key_factors.impact_cn: 公开赛前资料通常无法确认具体点球顺序，点球手只作为经验候选
key_factors.impact_en: Public pre-match information usually cannot confirm the exact penalty order, so possible takers are treated only as experience-based candidates.
key_factors.text_cn: 公开赛前资料通常无法确认具体点球顺序，点球手只作为经验候选
key_factors.text_en: Public pre-match information usually cannot confirm the exact penalty order, so possible takers are treated only as experience-based candidates.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球rollout以一球差和延长点球为主，保留门将连续扑点和压力失误路径
key_factors.impact_en: The penalty rollouts mainly cluster around one-goal margins and sudden death, while preserving goalkeeper-save and pressure-miss paths.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球rollout以一球差和延长点球为主，保留门将连续扑点和压力失误路径
key_factors.text_en: The penalty rollouts mainly cluster around one-goal margins and sudden death, while preserving goalkeeper-save and pressure-miss paths.

key_factors.impact_cn: 点球大战常见比分族，结合门将、主罚手和心理压力作保守校准
key_factors.impact_en: A common penalty-shootout score family, conservatively calibrated using goalkeeper, taker-depth and pressure factors.
key_factors.text_cn: 点球大战常见比分族，结合门将、主罚手和心理压力作保守校准
key_factors.text_en: A common penalty-shootout score family, conservatively calibrated using goalkeeper, taker-depth and pressure factors.

penalties.workflow_cn: 点球专属流程：证据整合 → 4个专家Agent → 专家委员会聚合 → 点球序列Rollout → 点球比分矩阵 → 点球Tail审计 → 报告输出。
penalties.condition_en: Condition: the match is level after 90 minutes and remains level after extra time; inputs include the 90-minute prediction, extra-time mini-pipeline results, penalty evidence, goalkeepers, takers and pressure factors.
penalties.workflow_en: Penalty-specific flow: evidence integration → four expert agents → committee aggregation → penalty-sequence rollouts → shootout score matrix → penalty-tail audit → report output.

method_en: The v6.3 branch-aware knockout pipeline uses pre-match evidence and an expert committee to build cross-stage mechanisms. MAS rollouts produce conditional paths for 90 minutes, extra time if drawn, and penalties if still drawn; Monte Carlo then samples the complete path tree.
architecture_en: Extra time and penalties are no longer independent post-processing outputs; they are driven by the same MAS conditional rollouts. The three front-end tabs are different slices of one complete path distribution, while the JSON structure remains v6.2.2-compatible.
